column1: # fia_cornered_clusters.tsv — (ECOREGION_PREFIX <TAB> SIGNATURE) pairs whose divergences have been
# BOTH-SIDES-TRACED and cornered as an accepted taxonomy class (not a fixable bug). The coverage sweep's
# dig-worthy extractor (filter_digworthy.jl) DROPS a candidate row when its stand's ECOREGION starts with
# a listed prefix AND its signature matches — so the sweep advances to NEW strata instead of re-pausing on
# an already-cornered cluster every ~200 stands. A prefix of "*" means GLOBAL (all ecoregions).
# ESCALATION GUARD (never dropped, always re-surfaced — see filter_digworthy.jl is_escalation):
#   • signature == UNCLASSIFIED  (needs a manual trace regardless of cluster)
#   • a MATERIAL structure blow-up: signature==structure_densephase AND worst_col ∈ {TPA,BA,SDI,CCF,QMD}
#     AND max_rel_pct >= 15  (the cornered classes keep density within ~1 unit; a real density bug exceeds this)
#   • a volume-EQUATION bug: worst_col == TCuFt (threshold-free) AND max_rel_pct >= 15  (cf slice-41 FORKOD zero-vol)
# Add a row here only after a dig session documents the corner in docs/FIA_FVS_COMPAT_AUDIT.md.
# The two SN taxonomy signatures are cornered GLOBALLY ("*"): dig #1/#2 verified them on ecoregion 221
# (Appalachian hardwood, many stands) and dig #2d on 223Ab (interior broadleaf) — IDENTICAL taxonomy
# (bit-exact cyc-0 → sub-print Float32 DBH-growth seed at cyc-1 with identical TPA → dense-phase self-thinning
# count-straddle + sawtimber merch-threshold crossings; density BA/SDI/CCF preserved). This matches the whole
# prior campaign (5000-scale sweeps + 4-variant outlier hunts, slices 31-40): the residual is signature-defined
# and geography-independent, a named compounded-ULP/count-straddle/threshold primitive, NOT a fixable bug. The
# escalation guard above still surfaces every genuine real-bug candidate (the 5 real fixes this campaign —
# covtyp/fuel-OOB/htcalc-NaN/PLANT/FORKOD — would all trip UNCLASSIFIED, a >=15% structure move, TCuFt, or a crash).
# ECO_PREFIX

column4: SN taxonomy (global): compounded-ULP DBH-growth tail + merch/board threshold crossings. Verified 221 (Appalachian) + 223Ab (interior broadleaf) identical; matches slices 31-40. Real volume-eq bugs still surface (TCuFt >=15% escalation).

SN taxonomy (global): near-SDImax self-thinning count-straddle (density BA/SDI/CCF preserved ~1 unit) + sawtimber threshold on ~zero bases + AVHT40 TopHt tie-break. Verified 221 + 223Ab identical. Real structure bugs still surface (structure_densephase w/ struct col >=15% escalation).
